고린도전서 16:1.content: Now concerning the collection for the saints, as I commanded the assemblies of Galatia, you do likewise.

고린도전서 16:2.content: On the first day of every week, let each one of you save, as he may prosper, that no collections are made when I come.

고린도전서 16:3.content: When I arrive, I will send whoever you approve with letters to carry your gracious gift to Jerusalem.

고린도전서 16:4.content: If it is appropriate for me to go also, they will go with me.

고린도전서 16:5.content: But I will come to you when I have passed through Macedonia, for I am passing through Macedonia.

고린도전서 16:6.content: But with you it may be that I will stay, or even winter, that you may send me on my journey wherever I go.

고린도전서 16:7.content: For I do not wish to see you now in passing, but I hope to stay a while with you, if the Lord permits.

고린도전서 16:8.content: But I will stay at Ephesus until Pentecost,

고린도전서 16:9.content: for a great and effective door has opened to me, and there are many adversaries.

고린도전서 16:10.content: Now if Timothy comes, see that he is with you without fear, for he does the work of the Lord, as I also do.

고린도전서 16:11.content: Therefore let no one despise him. But set him forward on his journey in peace, that he may come to me; for I expect him with the brothers.

고린도전서 16:12.content: Now concerning Apollos, the brother, I strongly urged him to come to you with the brothers; and it was not at all his desire to come now; but he will come when he has an opportunity.

고린도전서 16:13.content: Watch! Stand firm in the faith! Be courageous! Be strong!

고린도전서 16:14.content: Let all that you do be done in love.

고린도전서 16:15.content: Now I beg you, brothers—you know the house of Stephanas, that it is the first fruits of Achaia, and that they have set themselves to serve the saints—

고린도전서 16:16.content: that you also be in subjection to such, and to everyone who helps in the work and labors.

고린도전서 16:17.content: I rejoice at the coming of Stephanas, Fortunatus, and Achaicus; for that which was lacking on your part, they supplied.

고린도전서 16:18.content: For they refreshed my spirit and yours. Therefore acknowledge those who are like that.

고린도전서 16:19.content: The assemblies of Asia greet you. Aquila and Priscilla greet you much in the Lord, together with the assembly that is in their house.

고린도전서 16:20.content: All the brothers greet you. Greet one another with a holy kiss.

고린도전서 16:21.content: This greeting is by me, Paul, with my own hand.

고린도전서 16:22.content: If any man doesn’t love the Lord Jesus Christ, let him be cursed. Come, Lord!

고린도전서 16:23.content: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.

고린도전서 16:24.content: My love to all of you in Christ Jesus. Amen.
